title: Transfer Ownership if user is not longer available

posts.author: EricP (Eric Palm)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

today I had contact with the Monday support team. We found out, that it is not possible to transfer the ownership of a workspace to another member if the owner is not available (sick leave, left the company,…).

Example: If the owner of your workspace is leaving the company, then you have to rebuild the hole workspace from scratch.
Monday-Team can not transfer the ownership!!
